name: demoflow-chrome-extension
description: Chrome extension for recording interactive product demos with DemoFlow

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run compile && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: cp -r assets manifest.json dist/ && cp src/popup/popup.html src/popup/popup.css dist/popup/ && mkdir -p dist/assets/styles && touch dist/assets/styles/content.css
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run watch
scripts.zip: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../demoflow-extension.zip .

author: DemoFlow Team
